Defines macros for app metadata with conditional color inclusion based on platform.

# Purpose
This code is a configuration snippet that defines how application metadata is structured based on the platform. It uses preprocessor directives to conditionally define the `APP` macro, which specifies the format of application metadata entries. If the `PLATFORM_TINTIN` macro is defined, the `APP` macro omits the `color` parameter, as the Tintin platform does not include color information in its application metadata. Otherwise, the `APP` macro includes the `color` parameter. The code then uses the `APP` macro to define an application entry for an iOS SMS app with specific identifiers and resources. The `APP` macro is undefined at the end to prevent further use outside the intended context.
